Licensed Cosmetologist · 18+ Years

Meet Brittani

More than a spa —
a personalized experience

I am a licensed Cosmetologist with over 18 years of experience in the beauty industry. I earned my makeup artist certification from the prestigious Westmore Academy in Burbank, CA, and graduated from the Ann Webb Skin Institute as both an Eyelash Extension Specialist and Cosmetology Instructor.

As a proud woman-owned business, I'm known for my enthusiastic personality and commitment to holistic healing. I exclusively use organic skincare products and my passion lies in helping every client feel exceptional and valued — because you deserve nothing less.

👑

Proudly woman-owned and operated since 2015. Supporting Brit's Beauty Spa means supporting a local Austin woman entrepreneur who pours her heart into every single client.

👑 Woman-Owned Licensed Cosmetologist Westmore Academy Ann Webb Skin Institute Lash Extension Specialist Cosmetology Instructor Organic Skincare StyleSeat Top Pro

📰 Featured in Voyage Austin Magazine — Read Brittani's Story →

Our Services

Curated luxury services
for the modern woman

Click any service to book directly on StyleSeat. All treatments are fully customized to your unique needs.

01

Organic Facials

100% organic skincare tailored to your unique skin type. Every treatment leaves you glowing.

Customized Organic Facial$100 · 90 min

Personalized facial with deep cleansing, exfoliation, and custom masque.

Hydro Facial ⭐ Andre's Favorite$165 · 90 min

Water-based exfoliation, deep pore cleanse, and instant hydration infusion.

The Ultimate Relaxation$150 · 75 min

Deep cleansing, massage techniques, and nourishing organic masques.

Quick Facial$85 · 45 min

Express cleansing, exfoliation, and hydration. Perfect for a lunch break.

Pampering for your Teen$75 · 45 min

Gentle, age-appropriate facial with light cleansing and hydration.

Back Facial$90 · 45 min

Deep cleansing, exfoliation, and masque for your back.

Exfoliation Treatment$40 · 30 min

Brighten tone and prep skin for better product absorption.

Hot Oil Scalp Massage$20 · 15 min

Warm oil massage to nourish scalp and melt away tension.

Brow Clean Up$25 · 30 min

Precise shaping and grooming to frame your face beautifully.

Client Intake

Consent Forms

Please complete your consent form before your appointment. This helps Brittani customize your treatment safely and effectively.

All information is kept strictly confidential and used solely to provide you with the safest, most effective treatment.

* Required fields

Personal Information

Skin Type

Medical & Health History

⚠️ Please check ALL that apply. Essential for your safety.

Skin Sensitivity & Medications

⚠️ These medications cause skin sensitivity. Check all that apply.

Consent & Acknowledgment

I confirm all information is accurate and complete.
I understand certain conditions or medications may affect my treatment and have disclosed all relevant information.
I understand Brit's Beauty Spa is not liable for reactions from undisclosed conditions or allergies.
I consent to receive the facial treatment and will notify my esthetician of any discomfort.
🌸
Thank You!

Your facial consent form has been submitted. We look forward to seeing you!

Please complete before your lash extension appointment.

* Required fields

Personal Information

Eye & Lash History

Medical & Health History

⚠️ Please check all that apply.

Aftercare Acknowledgment

I will avoid water, steam, and sweat for 24–48 hours.
I will not use oil-based products near my eyes.
I will brush my lashes daily and sleep on my back or side when possible.
I understand lash retention varies based on my lash cycle, lifestyle, and aftercare.
I consent to lash services and understand Brit's Beauty Spa is not liable for reactions from undisclosed conditions.
👁️
Thank You!

Your lash extension consent form has been submitted!

Please complete before your lash lift & tint appointment.

* Required fields

Personal Information

Lash Lift History

Medical & Health History

⚠️ The lash lift solution contains a chemical perming agent.

Aftercare Acknowledgment

I will keep my lashes dry for 24 hours after my lash lift.
I will avoid steam, saunas, swimming, and heavy sweating for 24 hours.
I will not rub my eyes or use mascara for 24 hours.
I understand results depend on my natural lash length, thickness, and health.
I consent to lash lift services and understand Brit's Beauty Spa is not liable for reactions from undisclosed conditions.
✨
Thank You!

Your lash lift consent form has been submitted!

Please complete before your spray tan appointment for the best possible result.

* Required fields

Personal Information

Skin Type & Tone

Medical & Health History

⚠️ Some conditions and medications can affect your spray tan result.

Pre-Tan Prep Acknowledgment

✅ Please confirm you have completed the following:
I have exfoliated my skin within 24 hours of my appointment.
I have shaved or waxed at least 24 hours before my appointment.
I am arriving with clean, dry skin — no lotion, deodorant, makeup, or perfume.
I will avoid water, sweating, and tight clothing for at least 8 hours after my tan.
I consent to spray tan services and understand Brit's Beauty Spa is not liable for reactions from undisclosed conditions.
🌟
Thank You!

Your spray tan consent form has been submitted. Get ready for your gorgeous glow!
